mapper.select: select r.record_id, r.user_id, r.ops_unit_id, r.ent_code, r.out_put_id, r.punch_time_in, r.punch_location_in, r.punch_time_out, r.punch_location_out, r.punch_duration, r.assistant, r.assistant_remark, u1.user_name, u1.nick_name, ext.unit_name as ops_unit_name, e.ent_name, o.out_put_code, o.out_put_name, u2.user_name as assistant_name, u2.nick_name as assistant_nick from t_ops_att_record r left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = r.ent_code left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = r.out_put_id left join sys_user u1 on u1.user_id = r.user_id left join sys_user u2 on u2.user_id = r.assistant left join t_ext_unit_lib ext on ext.unit_code = r.ops_unit_id where record_id = #{recordId}

select record_id, punch_time_in, punch_time_out from t_ops_att_record where user_id = #{userId} and ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and ops_unit_id = #{opsUnitId} order by record_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_ops_att_record (record_id, user_id, ops_unit_id, ent_code, out_put_id, punch_time_in, punch_location_in) values (#{recordId}, #{userId}, #{opsUnitId}, #{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{punchTime}, #{punchLocation})
mapper.update: update t_ops_att_record set punch_time_out = #{punchTime}, punch_location_out = #{punchLocation}, punch_duration = CASE WHEN punch_time_in IS NOT NULL AND #{punchTime} IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, punch_time_in, #{punchTime}) ELSE NULL END where record_id = #{recordId}

update t_ops_att_record set assistant = #{assistant}, assistant_remark = #{assistantRemark}, punch_time_out = #{punchTimeOut}, punch_duration = CASE WHEN punch_time_in IS NOT NULL AND #{punchTimeOut} IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, punch_time_in, #{punchTimeOut}) ELSE NULL END where record_id = #{recordId}
